content: Just as the linguistic definition of reflection frames it as both a physical reflection of light and an intentional metacognitive act of review, the original Reflexion autonomous agent framework can be extended to add a dual-layer self-reflection mechanism for LLMs that combines "light-like reflection" (capturing implicit, unfiltered output traces of LLM reasoning and intentional metacognitive review. This dual-layer mechanism would let LLMs first reflect on their raw unedited reasoning steps as a mirrored reflection, before engaging in critical structured self-evaluation.
